untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires analysis of 4-candle sequence with specific shadow/engulfment properties that cannot be fully expressed with single-bar indicators. Specifically: (1) detecting first two tall black candles without shadows across multiple bars, (2) identifying inverted hammer on bar 3, (3) verifying complete engulfment of bar 3 by bar 4 including shadows. The backtest engine lacks multi-bar pattern matching operators or engulfment detection logic. Stop placement and target price computation marked as AUTHOR_SILENT in source.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using available indicators: entry conditions model aggressive black candle bodies (close < open, body_pct > 0.8) with minimal lower wicks. Exit uses trend reversal above SMA_20. However, this does NOT capture the true 4-candle Concealing Baby Swallow pattern. Pattern frequency noted as 'worst/dead last' with poor performance (101/103 success rate suggests 98% failure rate). Recommend manual review or enhanced pattern matching engine before backtesting.
